artefacts.name: Primordial Void
artefacts.description: Represents the unformed state of existence from which all structure emerges.

artefacts.name: Genesis Spark
artefacts.description: Represents the first impulse through which emergence and formation begin.

artefacts.name: Infinite Potential
artefacts.description: Embodies the limitless field of possibility contained within primordial existence.
